executives.name: Charles H. Robbins
executives.background: Chuck Robbins is Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Cisco. He has served as CEO since July 2015 and was elected Chair of the Board in December 2017. Prior to that, he held various leadership positions at Cisco since joining in 1997, including Senior Vice President of Worldwide Field Operations.

executives.name: Richard Heron
executives.background: Richard Heron is Chief Financial Officer of Cisco. He joined Cisco in 2024. Previously, he served as CFO of Luminar Technologies and held various senior finance roles at other technology companies.

executives.name: Maria Martinez
executives.background: Maria Martinez is Chief Operating Officer of Cisco. She joined Cisco in 2018. Previously, she was President, Global Customer Success and Salesforce Services at Salesforce.com.

executives.name: Jeffrey S. Sharritts
executives.background: Jeff Sharritts is Executive Vice President and Chief Customer and Partner Officer. He has been with Cisco since 2000 in various sales leadership roles.

executives.name: Dev Stahlkopf
executives.background: Dev Stahlkopf is Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer. She joined Cisco in 2021 from Microsoft, where she was Corporate Vice President and General Counsel.

board_of_directors.name: Charles H. Robbins
board_of_directors.background: Chair and CEO of Cisco Systems, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: M. Michele Burns
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Mercer LLC. Former CFO of Delta Air Lines, Inc. and Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Wesley G. Bush
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Michael D. Capellas
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of Capellas Strategic Partners. Former Chairman and CEO of First Data Corporation and Compaq Computer Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Garrett
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Adobe Systems Incorporated.

board_of_directors.name: John D. Harris II
board_of_directors.background: Former Vice President of Business Development for Raytheon Company and CEO of Raytheon International.

board_of_directors.name: Kristina M. Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Former President of The Ohio State University. Former Chancellor of the State University of New York.

board_of_directors.name: Roderick C. McGeary
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman of BearingPoint, Inc. and former Co-Vice Chairman of KPMG LLP.

board_of_directors.name: Sarah J. Miller
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Information Officer of Neiman Marcus Group.

board_of_directors.name: Nicole Piasecki
board_of_directors.background: Former Vice President and General Manager of Propulsion Systems at Boeing Commercial Airplanes.

sources.source_description: Cisco Systems, Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended July 27, 2024
